notes: Iraq have a fully fit 26-man squad with no confirmed injuries or suspensions reported, giving Graham Arnold a free selection hand. Norway are also at full strength — Haaland confirmed fit by Solbakken and Ødegaard has dismissed prior fitness concerns — though Oscar Bobb and Jørgen Strand Larsen drop to the bench as rotation choices.
